title: 279 Mathematics d e MO nstrati O n
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: 279 Mathematics d e MO nstrati O n
objective: To factorise a polynomial, say (2 x 2  + 4 x )
materials:
Blue and red chart papers, scissors, geometry box,
eraser, pen/pencil
procedure:
1.   Cut out sufficient number of pieces of
dimensions 3 cm   ×   3 cm to represent   x   2
from a blue coloured chart paper and
of 3   cm   ×   1   cm to represent   x   from a red
coloured chart paper (Fig.   1).
observation:
1.   Take 2 x 2  and 4 x   using the above cut outs as in Fig. 2.
Fig. 2
discussion:
This activity can be used to verify that opposite angles of the following
figures are equal:
(i)   Square
(ii)   Rectangle
(iii)   Rhombus
280 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
